{{Quote|After denouncing her claims to be a Sith, Dooku challenges Asajj in combat and defeats her. But he is so impressed with her skills that he gives her an important assignment - to assassinate Anakin Skywalker.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/7.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Seven (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 7'''" is the seventh episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the seventh episode in [[Clone Wars: Season One|Season One]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 17]], [[2003]].

==Plot summary==
After [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] claims to be a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] scoffs at her, assuring her of its impossibility. Angered, Ventress charges him, but is rendered unconscious by a blast of his [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]].

Ventress awakens in her large, elaborately-furnished penthouse, her two [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] nearby in a silver tray. As soon as she takes them up, Dooku suddenly appears and instantly attacks. A long, brutal fight ensues, in which Dooku demonstrates obvious fighting superiority. Ventress is eventually defeated—her lightsabers having been destroyed by Dooku—and driven to the ground by a [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force Push]]. Left at the point of his blade, she asks him to finish her off.

At that point, a mobile [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] unit enters the room, making its way down the stairs. Dooku introduces her to [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Sidious]], his master. Sidious applauds her efforts, and personally gives her first mission for the Sith: hunt down and kill [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].

Dooku then presents Ventress with both a pair of new lightsabers, as well as a [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. As she flies off to complete her task, Dooku remarks that he is confident in her success. Sidious replies that her success or failure is unimportant—the point is to test Skywalker.

==Continuity==
Like the previous episode, this one takes place several weeks before the previous five episodes.

Although it is not stated in the episode, the lightsabers that Dooku gives Asajj were taken from [[Komari Vosa]], his former [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], whom he slew after she fought [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] as seen in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''.
